hero.description: Passionate about creating and learning technology, with strong analytical and problem-solving capabilities. A responsible, creative, and punctual professional who welcomes challenges, works well in teams, and focuses on delivering results.

about.title: About Me

skills.title: Technical Skills
skills.subtitle: Technologies and tools I use to build high-quality solutions

descriptions: Designed and implemented end-to-end serverless workflows using AWS Lambda and EventBridge to process daily policy data, including real-time status updates, comprehensive logging, and WebSocket communication for frontend notifications.
Developed PDF generation services using Lambda functions, enabling document creation, ZIP packaging, and secure pre-signed S3 URLs for user downloads.
Automated AWS deployments through Azure DevOps CI/CD pipelines and maintained high code quality with Jest and Cucumber automated testing.
Built full-stack web applications with responsive frontend interfaces and optimized API integrations, implementing authentication, route protection, and CRON jobs for task automation.
Designed and deployed network infrastructure using Terraform and DigitalOcean for server migration between domains, including VPC configuration for secure service connectivity.
Developed SDN-based web applications for network device analysis and monitoring, improving network management capabilities for routers and switches.
Interned in voice and data administration within a telecommunications network environment, analyzing KPIs and ensuring optimal network performance.
Automated reporting processes and developed configuration scripts for network elements, improving operational efficiency.
